extraction.one_line_summary: LUTSENKO Alexey attacked 5km from summit of final Alisa climb, held off KRISTOFF's chase to win by 3 seconds
tactical_patterns: VAN HECKE attacked solo from early breakaway on climb, forcing CCC to chase despite strong 5-minute gap
CCC team controlled without Van Avermaet attempting stage win, revealing non-aggressive tactics despite hilly finish
LUTSENKO attacked 5km from summit not at steepest gradients, catching sprinter teams during organized chase phase

rider_signals.VAN HECKE Preben: positive: strong enough to drop breakaway companions on climb and solo attack, GP de Denain form translating
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: positive: punchy climbing legs sharp enough to create 3-second gap on sprinters over final 5km climb
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: negative: CCC rode defensively for him but he didn't contest hilly finish despite team support
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: positive: climbed well enough on Alisa to limit losses to 3 seconds, unusual sprinter resilience on climbing finish
